explanations.pt-br: Importamos torch para o dtype e transformers para o modelo.
explanations.en-us: We import torch for the dtype and transformers for the model.

explanations.pt-br: `torch_dtype=torch.float16` carrega o modelo em FP16. `device_map='auto'` coloca na GPU.
explanations.en-us: `torch_dtype=torch.float16` loads the model in FP16. `device_map='auto'` places it on GPU.

explanations.pt-br: Verificamos dtype e uso de VRAM — ~14GB para Llama-2-7B em FP16.
explanations.en-us: We verify dtype and VRAM usage — ~14GB for Llama-2-7B in FP16.
